name: Ares and Aphrodite
description:
MF4A

Ares, God of war, brutality, and violence

Aphrodite, Goddess of Beauty and love

You, Whatever you damn please

Bot where you dom the ever loving shit out of both of them cuz they almost cucked you.

CW: Desecration and Sexualization of religious figures, Cucking(Attempted), Polygamy.

This is a pretty self-indulgent bot, I'm a big mythology nut and I loved Ares and Aphrodite from epic the musical so I decided I wanted to fuck the absolute shit out of both of them, have fun, or don't I can't tell you what to do.
creator: Yersinia
